briefdescription.para: flag tied dispersion parameters (gamma, Gaussian, von Mises)
offset for Gaussian mixture with evenly spaced means

detaileddescription.para: weights of observation distributions deduced from the restoration

briefdescription.para: Destruction of the data members of a ContinuousParametricProcess object.
Assignment operator of the ContinuousParametricProcess class.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::ostream &os, Histogram **observation_histogram, FrequencyDistribution **observation_distribution, Histogram *marginal_histogram, FrequencyDistribution *marginal_distribution, bool exhaustive, bool file_flag, model_type model=HIDDEN_MARKOV) const

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,

briefdescription.para: Writing of a ContinuousParametricProcess object at the spreadsheet format.

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,

briefdescription.para: Plot of a ContinuousParametricProcess object at the Gnuplot format.

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,
pointer on the empirical cumulative distribution function,

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,
pointer on the empirical cumulative distribution function,

briefdescription.para: Computation of the number of free parameters of a continuous observation process.
Computation of the mean of a mixture of continuous observation distributions.
Computation of the variance of a mixture of continuous observation distributions.
Choice of the unit for von Mises observation distributions.

memberdef.argsstring: (continuous_parametric iident, double min_value, double max_value, double mean, double variance)
memberdef.name: init

briefdescription.para: Computation of intervals on the basis of quantile and posterior probability criteria for a uniform weight distribution.

memberdef.argsstring: (StatError &error, ifstream &in_file, int &line, int nb_state, model_type model, continuous_parametric last_ident=VON_MISES)
memberdef.name: parsing

briefdescription.para: Analysis of the format of continuous observation distributions.

parameterdescription.para: reference on the file line index,
identifier of the last distribution in the list.

detaileddescription.para: Collection of univariate continuous parametric emission distributions. In the multivariate case, use a collection of conditionally independent ContinuousParametricProcesses observations[k] is a pointer to emission distribution for state k
